x="726" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="EmbeddingModel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="906" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hES" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;" value="Elasticsearch" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="120" x="1066" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lO" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="136" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="136" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lC" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="626" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lSP" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="801" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="801" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lE" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="971" y="130" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="971" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1126" y="960" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="1. POST /documents/{id}/publish"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="136" y="170" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="301" y="170" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="2. UPDATE status = PUBLISHED"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="301" y="210" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="466" y="210" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="3. ingest(document)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="301" y="250" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="626" y="250" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="4. split(content)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="626" y="290" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="801" y="290" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="5. List<Document> chunks"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="801" y="330" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="626" y="330" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=0;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=2;fontSize=10;fontColor=#2563eb;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="loop 每个 chunk" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="596" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#2563eb;curved=1;" value="6. put metadata(tenant_id, doc_id, ...)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="700" y="400" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="424" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="626" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="626" y="424" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="7. embed(chunks) （vectorStore.add 内部）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="626" y="470" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="971" y="470" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m8" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="8. float[] vectors"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="971" y="510" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="626" y="510" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m9" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="9. bulk index(ai_knowledge)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="626" y="550" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1126" y="550" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m10" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="10. ok"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1126" y="590" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="626" y="590" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m11" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="11. UPDATE es_indexed = 1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="626" y="640" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="466" y="640" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m12" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="12. done"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="626" y="690" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="301" y="690" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m13" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=open;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="13. 200 已发布"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="301" y="740" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="136" y="740" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fillColor=#f8fafc;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=8;spacingRight=8;rounded=1;" value="注：vectorStore.add(chunks) 把 embedding 与写 ES 打包；embedding 由 starter 注入的 EmbeddingModel 完成，业务代码不碰向量细节。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="1110" x="76" y="800" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
